title: 音楽学校の改修案

chart.caption: The plans show a music school now and a proposed refurbishment.
chart.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img' aria-label='平面図：音楽学校の現状と改修案'><title>Music school floor plan, now and proposed</title><g font-size='8' fill='#555'><text x='40' y='24' font-size='10' fill='#333'>Now</text><rect x='40' y='30' width='110' height='60' fill='none' stroke='#9aa0a6' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='95' y1='30' x2='95' y2='90' stroke='#9aa0a6'/><text x='50' y='58'>Classroom 1</text><text x='105' y='58'>Classroom 2</text><text x='55' y='104' fill='#c96442'>stairs / cupboard</text><text x='180' y='24' font-size='10' fill='#333'>Proposed</text><rect x='180' y='30' width='110' height='60' fill='none' stroke='#7c9cc4' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='235' y1='30' x2='235' y2='90' stroke='#7c9cc4'/><text x='190' y='58'>Classroom 1</text><text x='245' y='58'>Studio</text><text x='185' y='104' fill='#c96442'>ramp / toilets / lift</text><text x='185' y='118' fill='#7c9cc4'>♿ wider doorways</text></g></svg>

model_paragraph: The two plans show a music school as it is now and a proposed refurbishment. Overall, the changes will make the building far more accessible for people with disabilities. In the new plan, the stairs at the front entrance will be taken out and replaced with a wheelchair ramp. The supply cupboard on the ground floor will be converted into toilets, while the stairs at the end of the hallway will remain, though a new lift will be installed nearby. The doorways to the classrooms will be widened, and the trees outside will be cut down to make room for the ramp.

items.collocation: the stairs will be taken out

items.meaning: 維持される・残される
items.collocation: be kept in the same place

items.meaning: 収容する・受け入れる

drills.jp: 正面入口の階段は取り除かれ、スロープに置き換えられる。
drills.model_en: The stairs at the front entrance will be taken out and replaced with a ramp.

drills.jp: 備品室はトイレに改装される。
drills.model_en: The supply cupboard will be converted into toilets.

drills.jp: 廊下の端の階段はそのまま残る。
drills.model_en: The stairs at the end of the hallway will remain.

drills.jp: スロープのためのスペースを作るため、木は切り倒される。
drills.model_en: The trees will be cut down to make room for the ramp.

drills.jp: 各教室の戸口は広げられる。
drills.model_en: The doorways to the classrooms will be widened.
